title: mergeProps
description: Merges multiple props objects reactively, with later sources overriding earlier ones. Use for default props.
usage_bucket: The site publisher's <0>SiteBucket</0> merges a defaults object ahead of <1>rawProps</1>, so callers that omit <2>indexDocument</2> and <2>errorDocument</2> fall back to index.html while any supplied value still wins.
usage_tenant: The tenant fleet's <0>TenantTree</0> merges a starter <1>plan</1> ahead of the incoming props, giving every tenant a default tier without forcing each caller to spell it out.
in_the_wild: See these defaults shape real buckets and tenants in the <0>site-publisher walkthrough</0>.
